'''logavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zigzagging|zigzagging]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zigzagging|zigzagging]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| logavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:logavithi|logavithi]] || [[word:logaviji|logaviji]] || [[word:logavishi|logavishi]] || [[word:logaviki|logaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:logavuthuthu|logavuthuthu]] || [[word:logavujuju|logavujuju]] || [[word:logavushushu|logavushushu]] || [[word:logavukuku|logavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:logavuthu|logavuthu]] || [[word:logavuju|logavuju]] || [[word:logavushu|logavushu]] || [[word:logavuku|logavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:logavufthuf|logavufthuf]] || [[word:logavufjuf|logavufjuf]] || [[word:logavufshuf|logavufshuf]] || [[word:logavufkuf|logavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:logavethe|logavethe]] || [[word:logaveje|logaveje]] || [[word:logaveshe|logaveshe]] || [[word:logaveke|logaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:logavothotho|logavothotho]] || [[word:logavojojo|logavojojo]] || [[word:logavoshosho|logavoshosho]] || [[word:logavokoko|logavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:logavotho|logavotho]] || [[word:logavojo|logavojo]] || [[word:logavosho|logavosho]] || [[word:logavoko|logavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:logavofthof|logavofthof]] || [[word:logavofjof|logavofjof]] || [[word:logavofshof|logavofshof]] || [[word:logavofkof|logavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:logavÃŸfthÃŸf|logavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfjÃŸf|logavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfshÃŸf|logavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfkÃŸf|logavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:logavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|logavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|logavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|logavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|logavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:logavÃŸfthÃŸf|logavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfjÃŸf|logavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfshÃŸf|logavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfkÃŸf|logavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:logavÃŸfthÃŸf|logavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfjÃŸf|logavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfshÃŸf|logavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:logavÃŸfkÃŸf|logavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:logavÃḊthÃḊ|logavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:logavÃḊjÃḊ|logavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:logavÃḊshÃḊ|logavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:logavÃḊkÃḊ|logavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:logavathatha|logavathatha]] || [[word:logavajaja|logavajaja]] || [[word:logavashasha|logavashasha]] || [[word:logavakaka|logavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:logavatha|logavatha]] || [[word:logavaja|logavaja]] || [[word:logavasha|logavasha]] || [[word:logavaka|logavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:logavafthaf|logavafthaf]] || [[word:logavafjaf|logavafjaf]] || [[word:logavafshaf|logavafshaf]] || [[word:logavafkaf|logavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:logavasha|logavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:logavshÃḋsha|logavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logavrosha|logavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logavmusha|logavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:logavyasha|logavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologavnkshÃḋsha|gologavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologavnkrosha|gologavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologavnkmusha|gologavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologavnkyasha|gologavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:logagavasha|logagavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:logagavshÃḋsha|logagavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logagavrosha|logagavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logagavmusha|logagavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:logagavyasha|logagavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologagavnkshÃḋsha|gologagavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologagavnkrosha|gologagavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologagavnkmusha|gologagavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologagavnkyasha|gologagavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:legÃḊvasha|legÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:legÃḊvshÃḋsha|legÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:legÃḊvrosha|legÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:legÃḊvmusha|legÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:legÃḊvyasha|legÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golegÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|golegÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golegÃḊvnkrosha|golegÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golegÃḊvnkmusha|golegÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golegÃḊvnkyasha|golegÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:logfavasha|logfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:logfavshÃḋsha|logfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logfavrosha|logfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logfavmusha|logfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:logfavyasha|logfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologfavnkshÃḋsha|gologfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologfavnkrosha|gologfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologfavnkmusha|gologfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologfavnkyasha|gologfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
